final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing editorial photo for a Scandinavian minimalist living room scene.

Style/medium: photorealistic interior photography, clean Nordic minimalism, soft natural aesthetic
Composition: wide-angle establishing shot, eye-level perspective, balanced symmetrical layout with sofa as anchor
Subject: grey fabric sofa with clean lines, potted green plant, tall floor lamp with simple silhouette
Scene/backdrop: bright white walls, light oak wood flooring, large window with abundant natural light, airy open space
Lighting/mood: soft morning sunlight streaming through large window, diffused daylight, warm and inviting atmosphere
Color palette: warm white walls as base, light oak wood as secondary, grey sofa as neutral anchor, green plant as organic accent
Materials/textures: matte white plaster wall, natural oak wood grain, soft woven fabric upholstery, glossy green leaves, brushed metal lamp base
Avoid: cluttered decor, dark shadows, synthetic materials, ornate furniture, busy patterns, artificial lighting dominance
